title: JSON value type system
description: pjson must support the standard JSON value types: null, boolean, integer (int64), unsigned integer (uint64), floating-point (double), string, array, and object. Additionally, binary data and reference ($ref) types from the prototype should be supported as extensions.
rationale: Complete JSON type coverage is necessary for a general-purpose JSON library. Extensions (binary, $ref) provide persistent cross-reference and binary data capabilities.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: All standard JSON types are representable
Binary extension type is supported via $base64 encoding
Reference type is supported via $ref JSON pointers
Type checking and safe conversion methods are provided
